Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Okay, he's here. So what's this about?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Thanks for coming. There's someone I want to introduce.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Just a sec... This thing's freakin' heavy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}This is Junpei Iori from Class 2-F. He'll be staying here from now on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}He's staying here!? Are you sure there wasn't some mistake?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I bumped into him the other night.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}He has the potential, but he just awakened to it recently.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I told him about us, and he agreed to help out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Really? You have the potential!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}He found me cryin' like a baby at the convenience store, surrounded by a bunch of coffins.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}I don't remember much, but man, that's embarrassing![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}But he said that's, y'know, completely normal... in the beginning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Like, bein' confused and not remembering anything. Did you guys know that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Makes sense, since you're a Persona-user and all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}What, have you not talked to anyone about it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}You should know, since you're a Persona-user and all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Hey, what's with the tough-guy act?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}You should know about it, since you're a Persona-user and all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}But man... I still can't believe it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I had no idea you guys had this stuff goin' on too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Well, I'm glad I'm not the only one. Wouldn't really wanna be doin' this on my own.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}You gotta be stoked too, right!? Havin' me join?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Well, enough with the introductions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Now that our forces have increased...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Ooh, we gonna go do somethin'?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Sweetness! I'm gettin' pumped![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}With this many people, we can start checking out that tower.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}It's a place that holds the key to understanding the Dark Hour... or so we think.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}The chairman will give us more details tomorrow night, so be ready.[n]{f 1 1}
